title: Apollo Project Manifest
description: Configuration and metadata for an Apollo-managed project folder.

project_id.description: ULID prefixed with 'ap::' for project identity

root_dir.description: Absolute path to the project root

created_by_version.description: Apollo version string at project creation

last_opened_by_version.description: Apollo version string of last open

last_indexed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last successful index

last_indexed_by_version.description: Apollo version string of last index

initial_index_completed.description: True if first index has completed; false if bootstrap wizard still pending

mode.description: 'all' uses built-in skip list; 'custom' applies user-configured filters

include_dirs.description: Relative paths to include (custom mode only)

exclude_dirs.description: Relative paths to exclude; merged with built-in skip list

include_doc_types.description: File extensions to include (no leading dot); empty = all known plugin types

storage.description: Storage backend configuration; frozen at project creation (see PLAN_PROJECT_BOOTSTRAP §6.2.2)

backend.description: Persistent storage backend chosen at init time

db_hash.description: MD5 of origin_abspath; canonical CBL project identifier (cblite only)

db_relpath.description: Path to the CBL bundle relative to _apollo/ (project mode only)

origin_abspath.description: Absolute path used to compute db_hash; surfaced in the rebind dialog

cblite_version.description: libcblite version captured at create time, for migration gating

schema_version.description: Apollo's own CBL document/index schema version
